title: Vežba 101

questions.text:
Nakon razgovora sa Tomom, Alice je poslala SMS poruku svojoj mami:

Hey Mom, I've decided to switch jobs! I want to find a company with the best work-life balance and good career growth opportunities. I talked to my friend Tom, and he gave me a lot to think about. He told me about a few companies. One has the most structured training programs, another offers the highest salaries, and one has the most laid-back culture. That's interesting because I never thought so much about these differences before.

I think I'd really enjoy working in a place with a creative and relaxed environment. I also want a job that lets me grow but still gives me time for myself. Good to know there are companies that offer both!

Mom, I really appreciate that you always support me. I'll keep you updated! 😊💕

Kako je Ajlisa izražava zahvalnost u svojoj poruci?

answers.answer: Zahvaljuje se svojoj majci što ga/je uvek pomogla.

answers.feedback: Alice se žali. Ona je pozitivna u vezi svojih izbora.

answers.answer: Kaže svojoj majci da nije srećna sa njenim savetima.
Kaže da više ne treba nikakvu pomoć.
answers.feedback: Alice ceni pomoć svoje majke i kaže da će ga obavestiti o promenama.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.
explanation:
Alice izražava zahvalnost što je rekla Mom, I really appreciate that you always support me.

Appreciate znači zahvaljivati.

Nema žalbi o traženju posla, odbijanju saveta ili tvrdnji da više ne treba pomoć. Umesto toga, on/ona prihvata pomoć svoje majke i obećava da će je obavestiti o promenama.
